3: real judge's bench-style desk with a stack of candidate papers being ranked under a focused lamp
4: real lab bench with measurement instruments, a real scale, and a clipboard with checkmarks
5: real control room desk with a bank of monitors showing real dashboards beside a small lock icon

_meta.note: module = (cap-1)//5 -> 3,4,5. Each slot prompt below is the bespoke action clause only; the script prepends the module setting and appends accent glow + FUSION suffix, exactly like the reference script's formula.

16.sistema: the mascot stacking translucent glowing glass layers into a delicate tower: a bottom layer of two separate glowing embedding orbs, query and document, compared only by a thin cosine-angle beam, a middle lattice layer shaped like an HNSW graph representing the fast ANN index, and a heavier top layer where the same two orbs are fused together and threaded through glowing attention strands of a cross-encoder, one dim foggy bi-encoder layer visibly imprecise where the two orbs never truly touch
16.intencao: on one side the mascot casting a wide glowing net across dozens of translucent document tokens labeled top-50 candidates chasing recall, on the other side the mascot carefully holding only five to ten glowing tokens sharpened by a narrow cross-encoder beam chasing precision, a clear gap of soft light between the wide net and the narrow selection
16.fluxo: a winding path of five glowing stepping stones crossing the desk: the first cast as a wide net scooping fifty to one hundred candidate document tokens, the second lit by a cross-encoder beam re-scoring each pair, the third marked by a token-budget gauge trimming the list to top-k, the fourth pinning the single most relevant token at the very front away from a dim lost-in-the-middle zone, the fifth resolving two contradicting dated chunks until the newer one glows brighter, the tiny mascot walking the stones mid-journey
16.cenario: a swirl of generic hazy documents about retry best practices rising and dissolving above the desk while one crisp glowing document with real payment-service retry code condenses and rises to the very top of the ranked stack in the mascot's hands, a torn FAQ page with a jagged mid-sentence cut edge glowing faintly at the side
16.validacao: the mascot inspecting a glowing ranked list through a large magnifying glass, catching that the top item is ordered by a cosine-similarity number rather than true relevance, a document chunk glowing red buried in the exact middle of a long stack, a small ignored hourglass icon ticking behind a stage labeled optional
16.dica: the mascot completing a glowing checklist card labeled p95 latency test, a self-hosted bge-reranker-v2-m3 tag versus an API tag sitting on two small trays, a glowing stopwatch reading p95 beside a large launch button still dimmed
16.fluxo_motion: The five stones pulse in sequence — the wide net scoops candidates, a cross-encoder beam re-scores them, the token-budget gauge trims the list, the top token pins itself at the front away from the dim middle zone, two dated chunks resolve into one glow — the tiny mascot walks gently forward across the stones, warm dust motes float in the light, ambient elements drift subtly, slow cinematic push-in, seamless loop
16.dica_motion: The self-hosted and API trays glow as the stopwatch ticks through a p95 reading, the mascot's pen checks the card, the launch button slowly brightens as the test completes, warm ambient drift, slow cinematic push-in, seamless loop

17.sistema: the mascot stacking translucent glowing glass layers into a tower: one layer labeled Cohere Rerank glowing through a network-cable beam, a heavier layer labeled bge-reranker-v2-m3 sitting on its own humming GPU block, a third layer labeled ms-marco-MiniLM beside a small padlock representing compliance-sensitive data that refuses to leave the tower, one dim foggy layer wobbling because it was chosen by reputation alone
17.intencao: on one side the mascot pulling a wide glowing bundle of thirty to one hundred candidate tokens labeled N, on the other side the mascot carefully counting out a narrow stack of six to twelve glowing tokens sized to a token-budget gauge labeled K, a clear gap of soft light between the wide bundle and the narrow budgeted stack
17.fluxo: a winding path of five glowing stepping stones crossing the desk: the first listing four criteria, NDCG score, p95 latency clock, cost-per-thousand tag, and a compliance padlock, the second testing twenty to thirty real questions against candidate rerankers, the third deriving K from a token-budget gauge built from the generator's context window, the fourth comparing N at thirty against N at sixty as the top-K composition visibly shifts, the fifth settling on one of three compression choices, simple cut, sentence cut, or a small summarizer gear, the tiny mascot walking the stones mid-journey
17.cenario: a swirl of scattered fintech compliance documents and e-commerce product pages condensing into two separate glowing paths: one path locking behind a small padlock toward a self-hosted GPU block, the other flowing freely toward a cloud API icon during a Black Friday spike graph, a glowing token-budget gauge nearby settling at twelve chunks
17.validacao: the mascot inspecting a glowing reranker choice through a magnifying glass, catching a badge chosen for reputation rather than real testing, a K value glowing red as a suspiciously round arbitrary number, N and K measured dangerously close together on a small ruler, an auto-summarizer icon flashing warning near a legal clause

18.sistema: the mascot stacking translucent glowing glass layers into a tower: a layer of structured ficha-técnica specs, a noisier layer of customer review text, a layer of store policy pages, all three pierced together by a single glowing metadata rod tagged SKU, status, and last-update-date, one dim foggy discontinued-product layer left outside the tower

19.sistema: the mascot stacking translucent glowing glass layers into a tower: a layer of golden test questions each pinned to its known correct clause, a glowing NDCG@k gauge layer, a glowing hit-rate@k gauge layer beside it, and a looping arrow layer wrapping around the whole tower meaning rerun on every change, one dim foggy layer left untouched since launch day
19.intencao: on one side an original contract clause chunk glowing pale blue stamped with an old date, on the other side a newer aditivo clause chunk glowing amber stamped eight months later with a different value, both semantically close but pointing opposite directions, a clear gap of soft light with a small date-comparison beam between them
19.fluxo: a winding path of five glowing stepping stones crossing the desk: the first pinning each golden question to its one known correct clause, the second recalculating NDCG@k and hit-rate@k gauges after every pipeline change, the third flagging two semantically close chunks whose date stamps diverge, the fourth comparing average chunk size then against now as a gauge tips past its old K line, the fifth reading a handful of real production answers instead of only the synthetic set, the tiny mascot walking the stones mid-journey

19.dica: the mascot completing a glowing checklist card, dropping a newly found wrong-answer question into a golden test-set jar which grows fuller and brighter, a large launch button still dimmed beside it

20.sistema: the mascot stacking translucent glowing glass layers into a tower: a dim foggy bottom layer labeled pure retrieval baseline with no reranking, a bright reranked layer placed above it with a glowing delta arrow measuring the improvement between the two, a small tag noting the exact percentage gain
20.intencao: on one side the word política glowing over a stack of HR benefits documents, on the other side the same word política glowing over a stack of system-access security documents, both drawn from the same ambiguous question, a clear gap of soft light with a department-tag filter beam sitting between them
20.fluxo: a winding path of five glowing stepping stones crossing the desk: the first spanning twenty test questions across HR, engineering, finance, and legal with three marked ambiguous, the second measuring a pure-retrieval baseline with no reranking yet, the third assembling department filter, wide N, cross-encoder rerank, and token-budget K together, the fourth comparing the full pipeline's score directly against the baseline with a delta glowing between them, the fifth writing a final delivery-report card documenting configuration and trade-offs, the tiny mascot walking the stones mid-journey
20.cenario: a swirl of RH and engineering documents condensing around one ambiguous glowing question about approval above a limit, splitting into a finance path and a security path once a department tag filters it; nearby two bar gauges rise from forty-five to eighty-two percent hit-rate for comparative questions after reranking, while a simple-question gauge stays near a flat thirty percent; a small card compares N at forty against N at eighty with a latency clock doubling beside a modest two-point gain

21.sistema: the mascot stacking translucent glowing glass layers into a tower: a bottom pair of layers labeled context recall and context precision measuring the retrieval stage, a top pair of layers labeled faithfulness and answer relevancy measuring the generation stage, a thin diagnostic beam tracing down from a bad answer to find exactly which layer glows dim
21.intencao: on one side a glowing response chunk checked claim by claim against the retrieved context for faithfulness, on the other side the same response checked only against the original question for answer relevancy, a clear gap of soft light where a fluent but ungrounded answer could pass one side and fail the other
21.fluxo: a winding path of five glowing stepping stones crossing the lab bench: the first replacing a vague thumbs-up impression with four numeric gauges, the second splitting a bad answer into a retrieval branch and a generation branch, the third running faithfulness, answer relevancy, context precision, and context recall together against a representative question set, the fourth crossing a high context-recall reading against a low faithfulness reading to reveal a generation-stage problem, the fifth re-running the same four gauges after every pipeline change, the tiny mascot walking the stones mid-journey
21.cenario: a swirl of streaming-plan support tickets condensing around a context-recall gauge stuck at seventy-eight percent, an unindexed policy-exception annex glowing faintly out of reach; nearby a stack of news articles being merged by the mascot into one glowing summary that briefly claims a fact no single article supports, a faithfulness gauge dipping low beside it; a third glowing legal answer sounds fluent and on-topic yet a faithfulness needle alone drops into a red zone while an answer-relevancy needle stays comfortably high
21.validacao: the mascot examining a glowing scroll listing four labeled dials, faithfulness, answer relevancy, context precision, context recall, through a large magnifying glass, the faithfulness needle stuck deep in a red zone while the other three needles sit comfortably in green, a small convincing-sounding answer glowing deceptively pleasant beside the scroll
21.dica: the mascot completing a glowing checklist card with two columns, problema de retrieval and problema de geração, sorting glowing failure tokens into each column, a large launch button still dimmed beside it
21.fluxo_motion: The five stones pulse in sequence — four numeric gauges replace a vague thumbs-up, a bad answer splits into two branches, all four gauges glow together, a high context-recall reading crosses against a dim faithfulness reading, the gauges reset and glow again after a pipeline change — the tiny mascot walks gently across, warm dust motes drift, slow cinematic push-in, seamless loop

22.sistema: the mascot stacking translucent glowing glass layers into a tower: a layer of real support-ticket questions, a layer of beta-user questions, a layer of domain-expert-authored questions, all glowing warm and textured, with one dim foggy synthetic layer generated by an LLM sitting oddly smooth and too easy at the very bottom, visibly mismatched
22.intencao: on one side small glowing framework logos, RAGAS, TruLens, DeepEval, sitting almost interchangeable and unremarkable, on the other side a judge-model gavel glowing brighter being calibrated against twenty to thirty human-checked judgments, a self-preference warning glint near the gavel, a clear gap of soft light between framework choice and judge calibration
22.fluxo: a winding path of five glowing stepping stones crossing the lab bench: the first gathering real questions from support tickets, beta logs, and expert interviews, the second having a domain expert validate the correct context and reference answer for each, the third deliberately placing a fraction of unanswerable questions into the golden set, the fourth choosing an evaluation framework and configuring which model serves as judge, the fifth calibrating the judge's verdicts against human judgments with a concordance percentage glowing, the tiny mascot walking the stones mid-journey
22.cenario: a swirl of scattered compliance support tickets condensing into fifty glowing real questions in the mascot's hands; nearby a concordance gauge dips to sixty-eight percent on complex regulatory questions, below an eighty-five percent line, then rises to ninety-one percent once the judge model is swapped for a different family; eight small unanswerable question tokens glow apart from the rest, six of them tricking the system into a confident invented answer about a future regulation
22.validacao: the mascot inspecting through a magnifying glass a golden dataset built entirely from LLM-generated questions glowing suspiciously uniform and easy, the same model icon serving as both generator and judge with no calibration arrow between them, a golden set with zero unanswerable questions, a reference answer stamped without any domain-expert signature, a framework logo oversized compared to a tiny judge-calibration icon
22.dica: the mascot completing a glowing checklist card splitting one overall concordance percentage into three segments, easy, ambiguous, unanswerable, the ambiguous segment glowing a lower amber number hidden behind a reassuring green average, a large launch button still dimmed beside it

23.sistema: the mascot stacking translucent glowing glass layers into a tower: a layer holding a cobertura-geral clause and a layer holding a cláusula-de-exclusão, connected by a thin glowing thread that snaps and dims when a poor chunking cut separates them onto distant, disconnected shelves
23.intencao: on one side a dense embedding beam glowing strong around the semantic meaning of a sentence but fading weakly around an exact clause code 4.2.1, on the other side a lexical BM25 beam glowing bright precisely around that same numeric code, a reciprocal-rank-fusion beam merging both into one stronger glow between them
23.fluxo: a winding path of five glowing stepping stones crossing the lab bench: the first categorizing real claims-analyst questions into coverage, exclusion, comparison, and technical-code types, the second measuring a dense-only baseline segmented by category, the third diagnosing a recall gap concentrated on clause-code questions, the fourth merging a dense beam and a BM25 beam through reciprocal rank fusion, the fifth comparing the new segmented recall side by side against the old baseline, the tiny mascot walking the stones mid-journey

24.sistema: the mascot stacking translucent glowing glass layers into a tower: a bright green answer-relevancy layer glowing confidently on top, hiding directly beneath it a dim red faithfulness layer nearly invisible in the tower's shadow, the mismatch between the two layers glowing like a hidden crack

24.fluxo: a winding path of five glowing stepping stones crossing the lab bench: the first pairing faithfulness and answer-relevancy gauges so neither is read alone, the second re-running the golden set on a recurring interval instead of only at launch, the third refreshing the golden set with newly gathered real production questions, the fourth nudging precision and faithfulness needles in the same reading whenever N and K are raised, the fifth recording a small history card of every configuration change beside its metric delta, the tiny mascot walking the stones mid-journey

25.sistema: the mascot stacking translucent glowing glass layers into a tower with clear gaps of light between each: a versioned golden-dataset-storage layer with a small archive tag, an executor layer running the pipeline and collecting context and answers, an evaluator layer applying four metric gauges, each layer clearly decoupled and swappable rather than fused together
25.intencao: on one side an endless glowing spiral of refinement with no visible end, on the other side a clean glowing definition-of-done card listing four fixed criteria being checked off one by one, a clear gap of soft light between the spiral and the finished card
25.fluxo: a winding path of five glowing stepping stones crossing the lab bench: the first assembling three decoupled harness components side by side, the second populating a golden dataset with twenty-five to thirty real questions and a deliberate unanswerable fraction, the third producing a segmented baseline report across categories, the fourth implementing one single improvement hypothesis glowing alone, the fifth comparing the rerun result against the baseline while writing the final report card, the tiny mascot walking the stones mid-journey

26.sistema: the mascot stacking translucent glowing glass layers into a tower: a fused layer holding both a vector point and its raw payload text bound inseparably together, an application-level access-control layer floating slightly disconnected above it, a thin leak-path glowing through a mis-scoped API-key gap between the floating layer and the fused data layer below
26.intencao: on one side the mascot masking a document with a redaction layer, personal identifiers dissolving into blank glowing placeholders that strip away clinical usefulness, on the other side the mascot placing a small glowing padlock filter that lets the full document pass only to an authorized role, a clear gap of soft light between destroyed information and preserved-but-guarded information
26.fluxo: a winding path of five glowing stepping stones crossing the control-room desk: the first wrapping the vector index itself in a faint padlock by default, the second classifying each document category as needing redaction, access control, or both before indexing, the third moving an access-control filter down from the application layer into the storage layer, the fourth instrumenting drift-monitoring gauges from the very first day, the fifth defining an incremental-reindexing trigger tied to source-document changes, the tiny mascot walking the stones mid-journey
26.cenario: a swirl of scattered multi-tenant client documents condensing dangerously into one shared unlabeled vector space, a small tenant_id tag missing from one new route glowing red as a leak risk; nearby a healthcare chart glows torn between a redacted version losing clinical detail and a full version locked behind a strict access gate; a warehouse terminology gauge drifts unnoticed for two months, stale documentation glowing dim against a new inventory system's brighter updated terms

27.sistema: the mascot stacking translucent glowing glass layers into a tower: a tenant_id metadata layer, a role layer, and an authorized-IDs layer all threaded through a glowing Postgres pgvector row-level-security gate positioned right before the similarity-search layer, a parallel dimmer path showing Pinecone, Weaviate, and Qdrant namespace tags as an alternate route into the same gate
27.intencao: on one side the mascot filing a reversible glowing placeholder into a small secured vault, mapped back to its original value for an authorized role only, on the other side the mascot stamping a permanently destructive placeholder that seals shut with no way back, a clear gap of soft light between the recoverable vault and the sealed permanent stamp
27.fluxo: a winding path of five glowing stepping stones crossing the control-room desk: the first modeling a permission schema of tenant_id, role, and confidentiality level before any indexing, the second moving the access filter into native row-level security or a mandatory namespace tag, the third running an NER pipeline over free text and choosing reversible or destructive placeholders, the fourth capturing baseline gauges before launch, relevance-score distribution, no-result rate, per-stage latency, the fifth actively testing isolation with two simulated roles confirming neither sees the other's document, the tiny mascot walking the stones mid-journey
27.cenario: a swirl of scattered resumes condensing into glowing candidate cards each tagged with a vaga and a responsible recrutador, a row-level-security gate letting only the assigned recruiter's query through; nearby a resume glows with name, email, and phone masked into placeholders while job titles and companies stay crisp and legible, a small reversible vault icon glowing nearby accessible only to that recruiter; a hundred simulated queries condense into a baseline relevance-score curve, and three months later a dip in that same curve traces back to a new resume format the original chunking didn't expect
27.validacao: the mascot inspecting through a magnifying glass a tenant filter passed only as an optional application parameter with an unguarded direct-database path beside it, a placeholder stamped permanently destructive without checking whether a recruiter would legitimately need the original later, a redaction pass that accidentally blanked out a job title along with a name, a launch dashboard with completely empty baseline gauges, a configuration marked ready with no active isolation test ever run
27.dica: the mascot completing a glowing checklist card describing an automated isolation test wired into the deploy pipeline, two small test-tenant icons confirming neither ever sees the other's document, a large launch button still dimmed beside it
